title: scrophularia depauperata
intro: Scrophularia depauperata, also known as the depauperate figwort, is a plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Scrophularia depauperata include its potential in treating conditions like fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Scrophularia depauperata can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its medicinal effects.
